channel.title: BUbuisnessAndMarket
channel.description: This is a randomly ordered feed of the most recent entries from BUbuisnessAndMarket, skipping any feeds with errors.

item.title: Ray Dalio warns of ‘great disorder’ period for world economy, marked by ‘clash of great powers’—just like the 1930s
item.description: The billionaire hedge fund manager warned that the world has entered a historical cycle that he believes is the most turbulent and violent possible.

item.title: Anthropic was supposed to be a ‘safe’ alternative to OpenAI, but CEO Dario Amodei admits his company struggles to balance safety with profits
item.description: Anthropic’s CEO says intense commercial pressure is testing the company’s safety-first AI mission.

item.title: $56 trillion national debt leading to a spiraling crisis: Budget watchdog warns the U.S. is walking a crumbling path
item.description: Trump is putting the U.S. economy on a "sugar high" and leaving other people holding the bill when it comes due a decade from now, according to the CR...

item.title: Companies are cycling through CEOs—and replacing them with first-timers
item.description: The year of the rookie CEO has arrived.

item.title: Thousands of CEOs just admitted AI had no impact on employment or productivity—and it has economists resurrecting a paradox from 40 years ago
item.description: In the 1980s, economist Robert Solow made an observation that reminded economists of today’s AI boom: “You can see the computer age everywhere but in ...

item.title: Rivian’s stock just had its best day ever. This analyst says it’s time to sell.
Has Paramount pulled its bid for Warner Bros. Discovery back from the brink?
Dow, Nasdaq and S&P 500 gaining in final hour; gold and silver decline — live
Stop watching gold’s daily swings and get ready for a $10,000 supercycle
Don't Short Yourself: This is the smart way to use AI to do your taxes
